summary: Stock Movement Reports feature testing complete. All backend APIs (20/20 tests passed) and frontend UI verified working. Page accessible only to Admin role with proper RBAC enforcement.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Stock Reports feature fully verified. All 5 tabs working (Stock Ledger, Current Stock, Transfers, Dispatch & Returns, Adjustments). Filters (Firm, Entry Type, Date Range) working. CSV export working. RBAC enforced - only Admin can access /admin/reports.

page_access.accountant_blocked: PASS - Accountant redirected to /accountant when trying to access /admin/reports
page_access.sidebar_link: PASS - Stock Reports link visible only in Admin sidebar

summary_header.total_inward_card: PASS - Shows Total Inward (Purchases + Transfers In + Returns)
summary_header.total_outward_card: PASS - Shows Total Outward (Dispatches + Transfers Out + Adjustments)
summary_header.stock_adjustments_card: PASS - Shows Stock Adjustments (Manual + Repair Yard entries)

tabs.stock_ledger: PASS - Shows all ledger entries with Entry #, Date, Type, Item, Firm, Qty, Balance, Invoice/Ref, Reason, By columns
tabs.current_stock: PASS - Shows Raw Materials, Finished Goods, Low Stock Items, Negative Stock stats and Stock by Firm table
tabs.transfers: PASS - Shows inter-firm transfers with Transfer #, Date, Item, From, To, Qty, Invoice, By columns
tabs.dispatch_return: PASS - Shows Dispatches and Returns side by side with totals
tabs.adjustments: PASS - Shows Adj In, Adj Out, Repair Yard stats and entries with reasons

filters.firm_filter: PASS - Filters data by selected firm
filters.entry_type_filter: PASS - Filters Stock Ledger by entry type (Purchase, Transfer In, etc.)
filters.date_range_filter: PASS - date_from and date_to filters work
